features.name: Project scaffolding
features.description: Create index.html, style.css, app.js, init git, GitHub repo, tracking files

features.name: JSON input/output editor
features.description: Left panel textarea, right panel highlighted output, Format/Clear/Copy buttons, drag-drop, Ctrl+Shift+F

features.name: JSON validation with error reporting
features.description: Validate on click and paste, show line number + error message, highlight error line

features.name: Soft color theme
features.description: Warm neutral background, subtle shadows, rounded corners, muted syntax highlighting, dark mode toggle

features.name: Responsive layout
features.description: Desktop side-by-side, tablet stacked, mobile tabbed view

features.name: SEO optimization
features.description: Semantic HTML5, meta tags, OG tags, JSON-LD, robots.txt, sitemap.xml

features.name: Adsterra ad integration
features.description: Placeholder ad containers with clear IDs and comments

features.name: Visitor counter
features.description: Today/Total visitors in footer via countapi or Sheets

features.name: Google Sheets webhook
features.description: Silent POST on Format click: timestamp, input length, validity, error type, user agent

features.name: Additional JSON tools
features.description: Minify, escape/unescape, tree view, JSON path finder

features.name: Quality of life
features.description: Line numbers, auto-format on paste, keyboard shortcuts panel, share URL, download .json

features.name: Performance & accessibility
features.description: Lighthouse >95 all categories, ARIA labels, keyboard nav, noscript fallback, lazy-load ads
